name: greeting-plugin
description: A customizable greeting plugin that demonstrates user-configurable settings

userName.title: Your name
userName.description: Your name for personalized greetings. Accepts: (string)

greetingStyle.title: Greeting style
greetingStyle.description: Choose your preferred greeting style: formal, friendly, casual, enthusiastic. Accepts: (string)

includeTime.title: Include time
includeTime.description: Include the current time in greetings. Accepts: true, false (boolean)
